title: How did Shinji safely rescue Asuka
display_title: How did Shinji safely rescue Asuka
wikitext:
[]: How did Shinji safely rescue Asuka?             Quote Post by Matas » Wed Jan 01, 2014 3:34 am I always feel like I miss something but every time I rewatch Eva I can never seem to figure out how Shinji and unit-01 safely descend into the magma in episode 10 without the fat suit thing and rescues Asuka and unit-02 . Shouldn't there have been repercussions?

[]:             Quote Post by Mr. Tines » Wed Jan 01, 2014 3:48 am AT Field magic or something. We can handwave about it only being for a short period and not so deep (so pressures weren't so extreme). But yeah, I was expecting that this was going to be where that annoying character who only gets like about 2 frames in the OP was going to bite the big one, and cue in a lot of Shinji angst at least to the half-way point of the series.

[]:             Quote Post by Gorbatschow » Wed Jan 01, 2014 7:42 pm The power of being a main character. I guess there's no real explanation except the screenplay. There must be a way to solve the climax and most of the time directors take the easy way out. (best example is Dragonball Z / YuGiOh!) A similar question would be: "Why do the Angel don't attack all at once" or "What was Kaworu's plan". Yeah there's probably a way to fanwank something, but still, it remains a plot whole / weakness in the script.

[]:             Quote Post by ElMariachi » Wed Jan 01, 2014 8:15 pm Well, it's fairly easy to explain : EVA-02 was close enough to the surface that Shinji could dive to save Asuka with his AT Field at maximum power to protect him. The main issue with the operation to capture Sandalphon was that it was too deep for an Eva to go in there and back with just an AT Field, hence the special suit for both EVA-02 and Asuka. She just got lucky/was skilled enough to ward off Sandalphon enough time to be on a depth reachable by EVA-01.

[]:             Quote Post by Chuckman » Wed Jan 01, 2014 8:26 pm The power of love.

[]:             Quote Post by Nuclear Lunchbox » Wed Jan 01, 2014 8:29 pm Mr. Tines wrote: AT Field magic or something. We can handwave about it only being for a short period and not so deep (so pressures weren't so extreme).

[]:             Quote Post by CJD » Wed Jan 01, 2014 9:41 pm Mr. Tines wrote: AT Field magic or something. We can handwave about it only being for a short period and not so deep (so pressures weren't so extreme).

[]:             Quote Post by monitoradiation » Wed Jan 01, 2014 10:58 pm Shinji was wearing an Eva. Also a lot of plot armor.

[]:             Quote Post by Coldwire » Sat Jan 04, 2014 3:01 am Yeah, never quite understood that. I mean, they made unit 02 wear this ridiculous suit to endure the mission and then Shinji dives like it's a piece of cake.

[]:             Quote Post by ElMariachi » Sat Jan 04, 2014 6:34 am Coldwire wrote: Yeah, never quite understood that. I mean, they made unit 02 wear this ridiculous suit to endure the mission and then Shinji dives like it's a piece of cake.

[]:             Quote Post by Lord ikari shinji » Sat Jan 04, 2014 8:57 pm Chuckman wrote: The power of love.

[]:             Quote Post by Alpha » Sat Jan 04, 2014 9:05 pm ElMariachi wrote: It's fairly simple actually : EVA-02 had to wear the big diving suit because she was sent at a depth of hundred of meters(too much for an AT Field to resist) in molten lava for at least 10-12 minutes, and when Shinji dived to rescue her, she was close to the surface, so his AT Field at maximum output was enough to protect him during the few seconds he was in the lava.

[]:             Quote Post by Squigsquasher » Tue Jan 07, 2014 6:54 am Here's an in-depth review on the subject.
